revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-015

Alternative term: Pilotage service

The provision of a service of specially qualified men possessing detailed local knowledge, who assist the masters of vessels to navigate them in particular areas.


Note: In Britain and the U.S.A. the word "pilotage" is also loosely used for piloting.

{{IALAFooter}}
